[[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Medium-range beam that culminates in a high impact shot.
raw.damage:
60 (over time)
60 (hitscan shot)
raw.ability details:
* The beam can be paused at any moment prior to the [[hitscan]] shot.
** This will reset the progress towards the hitscan shot.
* Even if you have less than 10 ammo remaining, the shot will still culminate to the [[hitscan]] before needing to reload.
* Damage per second: roughly ~86 while firing (~77 overall w/reload) [needs further testing]

raw.ability details:
* Each segment has individual health and can be destroyed individually.
* There is a total of 27 barrier segments, totalling 6075 barrier health across all of them.
** There are 9 segments per row, with 3 rows.
* The barrier is formed as a semi-circle from where placed.
* The cooldown starts once the barrier is placed, not once the duration ends.

abilities.name: Panopticon

raw.official description: Fire a hard-light barrier that imprisons enemies and detonates on expiration.
raw.pradius:
1.5 meters (globule)
0.2 meters (direct hit damage)
0.2 meters (matrix interaction)
raw.ability details: * The barrier(s) completely surround the affected target(s) in a spherical design. * Each barrier can be damaged and destroyed. Allied heroes can help destroy the barrier. ** A destroyed barrier will not detonate. ** A damaged barrier will do less damage when detonating. * The barrier acts and interacts as a typical [[Barrier]] for every ability, completely surrounding targets hit. This means: ** Sombra's [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] can destroy the barrier(s). ** Certain abilities that do not pierce barriers (such as [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]] and [[File:Ability-Lucio4.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Sound Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Sound Barrier|Sound Barrier]]) are blocked by the barrier. However, they can still affect others if they enter the encased barrier. * Panopticon can encase [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] (though if he keeps shooting, he can break the barrier in 3.3 seconds), it can also contain [[File:Ability-dva4.png|sub|link=D.Va#Self-Destruct|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Self-Destruct|Self-Destruct]], but only if the barrier is on the mech before the D.Va activates the ultimate. * While encased, [[Zarya]] cannot use her [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle Barrier]] and allies can't gained [[File:Ability-zarya3.png|sub|link=Zarya#Projected Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Projected Barrier|Projected Barrier]] protection. * The barrier cannot be cleansed and will persist if the target enters or exits a [[Phased out|phasing]] ability (such as [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]] or [[File:Ability-tracer3.png|sub|link=Tracer#Recall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Recall|Recall]]). ** The implosion damage can however be avoided while [[Phased out|Phased]] or [[Invulnerable]]. ** The only known way to directly cleanse the barrier is by [[D.Va]], who in pilot form can use [[File:Ability-dva6.png|sub|link=D.Va#Call Mech|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Call Mech|Call Mech]] to completely remove it.
